aria-hidden-body.description: aria-hidden="true" must not be present on the document body

avoid-inline-spacing.description: Inline text spacing must be adjustable with custom stylesheets

color-contrast.description: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

document-title.description: Documents must have <title> element to aid in navigation

form-field-multiple-labels.description: Form field must not have multiple label elements

image-redundant-alt.description: Alternative text of images should not be repeated as text

input-button-name.description: Input buttons must have discernible text

label-title-only.description: Form elements should have a visible label

link-in-text-block.description: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color

nested-interactive.description: Interactive controls must not be nested

region.description: All page content should be contained by landmarks

Exam and Surgical Radiation Reducing Gloves.
Exam and Surgical Radiation Reducing Gloves.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Exam and Surgical Radiation Reducing Gloves.</font>
• Made with premium, pure lead oxide for maximum protection.
• Latex-Free and Hypoallergenic finish creates a smooth interior which reduces skin irritation.
• Anatomically correct curved fingers reduce hand fatigue.
• Sizes range from 6 - 9 in half sizes for a better fit. MUST PICK SIZE at time of order.
MUST PICK SIZE at time of order.
<u> MUST PICK SIZE at time of order.</u>
• Attenuates up to 30% more direct beam radiation than other leading products.
Higher Protection Radiation Reducing Gloves.
Higher Protection Radiation Reducing Gloves.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Higher Protection Radiation Reducing Gloves.</font>
(See RR1 or RR2 above for enhanced tactile sensitivity required gloves.)
• Made with premium, pure lead oxide for maximum protection.
• Latex-free & Hypoallergenic reducing proteins, antigens and irritation.
• Soft-Touch finish creates a smooth interior also reducing skin irritation.
• Anatomically correct curved fingers reduce hand fatigue.
• Attenuates up to 50% more direct beam radiation than other leading products.
• 12" length. Use with Proguard Sleeves (scroll below) for complete coverage: finger tip to bicep.
• Available sizes: 7, 7.5 8, 8.5, 9 & 10 for an unequaled comfortable fit. MUST PICK SIZE at time of order.
MUST PICK SIZE at time of order.

<u> MUST PICK SIZE at time of
order.</u>
IDEAL FOR HIGH EXPOSURE PROCEDURES such as:
Surgical Radiation Reducing Sleeves.
Surgical Radiation Reducing Sleeves.
<font face="Arial,Helvetica" color="#CCFFFF" size="+1">Surgical Radiation Reducing Sleeves.</font>
Ablations • PTCA's • Billiary Drainage • ICD's • Stents • TIPS • Pacemakers • Vascular Procedures • Lead Extractions
• Latex free - reducing proteins, antigens and irritation.
• Extreme flexigility does not restrict movement or dexterity.
• Available in three sizes for a comfortable fit.
